channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Jeffries claims 'no election deniers' among Dems despite 2016 'illegitimate' remarks when Trump won
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, D-N.Y., who previously claimed that the 2016 presidential election was "illegitimate," told lawmakers that there are "no election deniers" in the Democratic Party.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republican Mike Johnson reelected House speaker in dramatic floor vote
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican Mike Johnson narrowly won reelection Friday as House speaker on a first ballot, overcoming hard-right GOP holdouts in a tense standoff and buoyed by a nod of support from President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, FARNOUSH AMIRI and KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden awards the Medal of Honor and Medal of Valor to military heroes and first responders
item.description: On Feb. 15, 1951, Army Pvt. Bruno R. Orig was returning from a mission when he found his fellow soldiers under attack in what's now known as the Battle of Chipyong-ni.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Mike Johnson re-elected speaker: Here were the top three moments of the dramatic vote
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson, R-La., narrowly held onto the gavel in a nail-biter vote on Friday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 23-year-old hopeful files to run for Tampa mayor
item.description: The next mayoral race is not until 2027. For Alan Henderson, he hopes that’s enough time for people to know his name and what he hopes to accomplish, if elected.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Capitol Hill's newest faces ready for bipartisan collaboration
item.description: Dozens of new lawmakers were sworn in, and Mike Johnson retained his position as House speaker Friday as Congress convened.
item.dc:creator: Joe Khalil, NewsNation

item.title: Ohio governor vetoes medical free speech clause he says would gut state's regulatory power
item.description: Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine has vetoed part of a bill cast by state lawmakers as protecting the medical free speech of doctors and other health professionals.
item.dc:creator: Julie Carr Smyth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump slams Merchan, Democrats, who 'just want to see if they can get a pound of flesh' amid failed cases
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: President-elect Donald Trump slammed Judge Juan Merchan for denying his request to dismiss the charges against him in New York v. Trump, telling Fox News Digital Democrats “just want to see if they can get a pound of flesh because every case has failed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: With Board Chair Nora Vargas ending her term, here's who's vying to replace her
item.description: As of Friday, there are four people who have shown interest in running to replace Chair Nora Vargas on the San Diego County Board of Supervisors at the end of her term.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: New York judge sets Trump sentencing days before inauguration
item.description: President-elect Trump's bid to toss his conviction in his New York criminal hush money case was denied on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge sets Trump's sentencing in hush money case for Jan. 10, but signals no jail time
item.description: In an extraordinary turn, a judge has set President-elect Donald Trump’s sentencing in his hush money case for Jan. 10 — little over a week before he’s due to return to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak And Jennifer Peltz, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nathan Fletcher's accuser dismisses sexual assault allegations from lawsuit
item.description: The former Metropolitan Transit System employee who accused Nathan Fletcher of sexual misconduct in a bombshell lawsuit that propelled his resignation from office has walked back some of her most serious allegations in new court filings.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: New Majority Leader Thune kicks off Senate session with pledge to preserve filibuster
item.description: New Senate Majority Leader John Thune is kicking off the new session with a promise to preserve the filibuster, saying in his first floor speech as leader that his priority will be to “ensure the Senate stays the Senate.”.
item.dc:creator: Mary Clare Jalonick, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: City of Albuquerque misused federal funds to give bonuses to staff: report
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (KRQE) – A new Office of the Inspector General report accuses Mayor Tim Keller's Administration of misusing COVID-19 federal grant money. A city councilor is now calling for a federal investigation.
item.dc:creator: Gabe Chavez, NewsNation

item.title: Potential 2028 Dem hopeful follows Biden lead, commutes 15 death-row sentences on final day as governor
item.description: On his way out of office, former North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper commuted the sentences of death row inmates, as the Tar Heel State has halted executions amid litigation over the past 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Live updates: Mike Johnson wins Speakership on first ballot after 2 'no' votes flip
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) succeeded in keeping his gavel for the 119th Congress, winning in the House's Speakership vote in one round Friday. Johnson, who had a one-vote margin of error, won 218-215 over Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.). Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.
item.dc:creator: The Hill staff, NewsNation

item.title: GOP trust in election accuracy rises after Trump's victory: Survey
item.description: Trump has publicly questioned or aired inaccurate claims about the 2020 election results, leading many within his party to also contest the legitimacy of the 2020 election.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Surgeon General calls for new label on drinks to warn Americans of alcohol's cancer risk
item.description: Alcohol is a leading cause of cancer, a risk that should be clearly labeled on drinks Americans consume, U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy proposed on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Seitz, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Which US elections are happening in 2025? Here's a look at upcoming primary and general contests
item.description: Most of the U.S. holds its major primary and general elections in even-numbered years, but there are a handful of places where competitive congressional, state and local-level contests will be happening in 2025.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jill Biden gets the priciest gift from a foreign leader in 2023
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden and his family were given tens of thousands of dollars in gifts from foreign leaders in 2023, according to an annual accounting published by the State Department on Thursday, with first lady Jill Biden receiving the single most expensive present: a $20,000 diamo
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump calls it the 'center of the universe.' Mar-a-Lago is a magnet for those seeking influence
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The cars begin lining up early in the morning to be screened by Secret Service agents under white tents near the fence that surrounds President-elect Donald Trump’s vast south Florida estate.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump gives complete and total endorsement of Johnson as Speaker
item.description: President-elect Trump offered his complete and total endorsement of Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Monday, days before a House vote on Friday to elect a new Speaker. "Speaker Mike Johnson is a good, hard working, religious man. He will do the right thing, and we will continue to WIN.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WFLA, NBC
